publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2025-09-05 23:59:57 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection contains the personal and professional papers of Henry Shaler Williams.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Henry Shaler Williams papers, #3127. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collection was added to #1148 in the 1970s, and separated as its own collection in 2025.

did.unittitle: Series I. Personal and family documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter of appointment to Cornell and pamphlet on Williams' contributions to stratigraphy.

did.unittitle: Diaries, account books, and memo books

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Many contain pressed flowers and leaves, notes, and calling cards.

did.unittitle: Yale course notes, correspondence, and documents
Diaries, account books, and memo books
Diaries, account books, and memo books
Three scrapbooks of clippings, correspondence, and pamphlets
Advertisements, ephemera, and signed photograph of Priscilla Dean
Harriet Willcox Williams diaries, notes, and annotated books
Postcards and cards to the Shaler family
Photographs of Henry Shaler Williams and family
Photographs of landscapes and geology expedition parties
Photograph of a "mummified frog found 541 feet under ground", with clipping pasted on back describing the find
Photographs of farm in Guayabal, Cuba
Harriet Willcox Williams correspondence with family

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Sigma Xi correspondence with Edith Williams.

did.unittitle: American Committee of the Congres Geologique receipts and accounts
Correspondence regarding photo processes for fossils

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes application for US and foreign patents for Williams' photographic process.

did.unittitle: US Geological survey official incoming correspondence in letter book volumes
US Geological survey outgoing correspondence letter book

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Folders are labelled with correspondents and topics.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Folders are labelled with correspondents and topics.

did.unittitle: Roger H. Williams correspondence regarding tax forms and other business
Yale organic evolution and examination papers
Cornell University lecture notes and manuscripts
Cornell department notes, correspondence, and lectures
Cornell University correspondence regarding fossil collections

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lecture XXIII contains mounted pressed leaves for "Leafe variation in evolution."

did.unittitle: Series IV. Manuscripts and publications by Shaler
"The Domestic Cat", GP Putnam and Sons

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Folders contain drafts, correspondence, and related material.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Folders contain drafts, correspondence, and related material.

did.unittitle: USGS Work in progress on Muculites from the Silurian formation of Washington Co, Maine
Notes on fauna, brachiopods, and various others
"Correlation of Geological Faunas: a Contribution to Devonian Paleontology" manuscript drafts
Notes on fauna, tropidoleptus, and various others
"Living Bodies and Their Behaviors" manuscript drafts
Manuscript drafts and publications by Williams
Manuscript drafts and publications by Williams
Discussions and reports of the Committee on Revision of Rules for Classification and Nomenclature of the US Geological Survey
Printed and bound publications by Williams
Series V. Professional Correspondence and Documents
Maps, rail road time tables, and charts

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Professional and personal. Removed from binders created by HS Williams.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Professional and personal. In binders created by HS Williams.

did.unittitle: Field correspondence with Charles Wolcott and others
Correspondence and documents from the American Journal of Science

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains some personal correspondence and manuscripts.

did.unittitle: Miscellaneous misfiled USGS correspondence and notes and papers
Misfiled correspondence Schurmann correspondence regarding resignation, Walcott's banquet
Notes, correspondence, documents, and pamphlets on the Saratoga Springs litigation

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: State of New York vs. New York Carbonic Acid Gas Company

did.unittitle: Transcript of testimony of trial regarding Saratoga Springs
Sigma Xi University of Washington application for a chapter
Sigma Xi membership cards and general material
University of Washington views and bulletin
Geological Society of America pamphlets and publications
Geological Society of America notes, programs, and correspondence
Geological Society of America pamphlets and publications
International Congress of Geologists publications and correspondence
United States Geological Survey publications and pamphlets
British Association for the Advancement of Science scrapbook of printed ephemera, notes, and correspondence
American Association for the Advancement of Science publications and pamphlets
Certificate designating Shaler as delegate for the National Conservation Exposition, signed by William Sulzer
Cornell and Yale pamphlets and ephemera
Henry Shaler Williams notes and book pages regarding fossils
Cayuga Lake Basin and Ithaca notebooks
